response: I heard there's trouble in the goblin caves. Brave souls are needed!
Dragons? In the King's Garden, if you're brave enough. Most who go never return.
Try the gold mines in your manor, or rob someone in the alleys if you're desperate!
The weapon shop has decent blades. For the really good stuff, visit the Merchant's Wharves.
Get yourself some plate armour from the shops. Dragon Scale is the best, but costs a fortune.
The Magician's Shop sells enchanted goods. Mages should focus on wisdom and mana.
The church sells healing potions cheapest. Stock up before heading outside!
Fight monsters outside town to gain experience. The harder the area, the more XP you earn.
The King holds tournaments for warriors level 12 and above. Grand prizes await!
The church offers daily blessings and cheap potions. Also a good place to... donate.
Buy land at the Army & Manor hall. Build farms, hire soldiers, become a lord!
Keep your gold in the bank. It earns interest daily, and thieves can't touch it there.
Watch your back in the alleys. Criminals lurk there, but so does easy gold if you're sneaky.
The guilds teach spells and special abilities. Essential for magic users.
Pirates have a cove along the seashore. Dangerous, but the loot is incredible.
The old crypt beneath the church crawls with the dead. Bring your best gear.
Magical rings can be found at the Magician's Shop. They give passive bonuses in combat.
Try asking about: quest, dragon, gold, weapon, armour, magic, potion, level, manor, ring
Between you and me... the Mystery Brew sometimes gives incredible power. Worth the risk.
Death isn't always the end. The church can sometimes bring back the fallen... for a price.
